title: protium ambrosiacum
intro: Protium ambrosiacum, also known as the 'Liquid Gold Tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Protium ambrosiacum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant's essential oil is often used in herbal preparations, including aromatherapy oils, salves, and creams, which are applied topically to reap its therapeutic benefits.
